note: Audio benchmark manifest (spec §25.3). Gold labels are frozen here; the audio files must be recorded by consenting team members or generated with a TTS voice (synthetic speech only, never real patient audio) into backend/data/audio/ using the listed file names. Executing this layer requires live transcription (OPENAI_API_KEY) and was NOT run in the build environment — see MORNING_REVIEW.md. Run: python -m app.benchmark --layer audio

recording_guidance.format: wav, 16-bit PCM, mono, 16 kHz or higher
recording_guidance.consent: Only consenting team members or synthetic voices. No real patient audio.

referenceTranscript.speaker: doctor
referenceTranscript.text: Are you currently taking any regular medication?

referenceTranscript.speaker: patient
referenceTranscript.text: Yes, I use the combined pill.

referenceTranscript.speaker: patient
referenceTranscript.text: I use the combined pill and take Tegretol.

referenceTranscript.speaker: patient
referenceTranscript.text: Sorry, I stopped Tegretol last year.

referenceTranscript.speaker: patient
referenceTranscript.text: I use the combined pill but I am not taking carbamazepine.

referenceTranscript.speaker: patient
referenceTranscript.text: I take Lamictal — that is L-A-M-I-C-T-A-L — and use an estrogen-containing pill.

referenceTranscript.speaker: patient
referenceTranscript.text: I take carbamazepine and use the pill.
